message:
feat(dashboard): add spinner animation for working state agents

Implement animated spinner for agents in working state:

- WorkingSpinnerFrame(): New function returning rotating circular
  segments (◐◓◑◒) synced with animation tick
- RenderPaneRow: Working status now shows animated spinner instead
  of static ● indicator
- renderPaneDetail: Status display uses animated spinner
- getStatusIconAndColor: Updated to accept tick parameter for
  spinner animation

The animated spinner provides clear visual feedback that an agent
is actively processing, making it easier to identify busy vs idle
agents at a glance.

Closes: ntm-b1uu

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ntm-aqqa","title":"Implement pre-commit hook for UBS quality gate","description":"## Overview
Create a pre-commit hook that runs UBS scans and blocks commits containing critical issues, ensuring code quality standards are maintained.

## Background
Pre-commit hooks provide the last line of defense before code enters the repository. Integrating UBS here:
- Catches issues before they're committed
- Provides immediate feedback to developers/agents
- Enforces quality standards consistently

## Implementation Details

### Hook Behavior
1. On commit, run UBS on staged files only (fast path)
2. Parse results and check against configurable thresholds
3. Block commit if thresholds exceeded
4. Output clear, actionable error messages

### Configuration (.ntm.yaml or similar)
```yaml
scan:
  pre_commit:
    enabled: true
    block_on:
      critical: true  # Block on any critical
      error: 5        # Block if >5 errors
      warning: false  # Don't block on warnings
    timeout: 30s
    exclude:
      - "*.test.go"
      - "vendor/**"
```

### Hook Installation
- `ntm hooks install` - Install pre-commit hook
- `ntm hooks uninstall` - Remove hook
- Hook script delegates to `ntm scan --staged --strict`

### Output Format
```
🚫 Commit blocked by NTM quality gate

Found 2 critical issues in staged files:

  src/auth/login.go:45 [critical] SQL injection vulnerability
  src/api/handler.go:123 [critical] Unhandled error return

Run 'ntm scan --staged' for details.
To bypass: git commit --no-verify (not recommended)
```

### Files to Create/Modify
- internal/hooks/precommit.go - Hook logic
- internal/hooks/install.go - Hook installation
- internal/cli/hooks.go - hooks subcommand
- scripts/pre-commit.sh - Actual hook script template

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Hook installs correctly in git repo
- [ ] Only staged files are scanned (fast)
- [ ] Configurable blocking thresholds
- [ ] Clear error messages with file:line references
- [ ] Bypass option documented but discouraged","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"WhiteStone","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:33:34.385746-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T03:56:22.357164-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-10T03:56:22.357164-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-aqqa","depends_on_id":"ntm-p77j","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:34:59.453887-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"ntm-aqqa","depends_on_id":"ntm-lk66","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-10T03:35:16.639902-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"ntm-bh5","title":"EPIC: Session Persistence & Recovery","description":"Sessions survive reboots and can be recreated from saved state.

## Problem Statement
Tmux sessions are ephemeral - a reboot or accidental kill loses everything:
- Agent counts, types, and arrangements must be manually recreated
- Working directory and project context is lost
- No way to 'bookmark' a useful session configuration
- Users avoid rebooting to preserve valuable sessions

## Goals
1. Capture complete session state (agents, layout, cwd, env)
2. Enable session recreation from saved state
3. Support periodic auto-snapshots for safety
4. Make session configs portable across machines

## Success Criteria
- `ntm session save` captures full session state to disk
- `ntm session restore` recreates session exactly
- Auto-snapshot on session creation (optional)
- `ntm session list --saved` shows available saved sessions

## Technical Approach
- Session state stored as JSON in ~/.local/share/ntm/sessions/
- Capture: session name, cwd, agent types/counts, layout, pane titles
- Restore: create session, spawn agents, apply layout
- Handle conflicts (session already exists) gracefully

## State Schema
```json
{
  "name": "myproject",
  "cwd": "/path/to/project",
  "agents": {"cc": 2, "cod": 1, "gmi": 1},
  "layout": "tiled",
  "panes": [{"title": "myproject__cc_1", "command": "claude"}],
  "created": "2025-12-10T10:00:00Z",
  "saved": "2025-12-10T12:00:00Z"
}
```

## User Value
- Fearless reboots - sessions are recoverable
- Consistent project setups across machines
- Reduced friction starting work each day
- Backup for accidental session kills","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-10T02:37:01.748915-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T17:01:14.543035-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-10T17:01:14.543035-05:00"}
 {"id":"ntm-bh5.1","title":"Session State Capture","description":"Capture complete session state to JSON for later restoration.

## State to Capture
```go
type SessionState struct {
    // Identity
    Name      string    `json:"name"`
    SavedAt   time.Time `json:"saved_at"`
    
    // Context
    WorkDir   string    `json:"cwd"`
    GitBranch string    `json:"git_branch,omitempty"`
    GitRemote string    `json:"git_remote,omitempty"`
    
    // Agent Configuration
    Agents    AgentSpec `json:"agents"`  // {cc: 2, cod: 1, gmi: 1}
    
    // Pane Details (for exact recreation)
    Panes     []PaneState `json:"panes"`
    
    // Layout
    Layout    string    `json:"layout"`  // "tiled", "even-horizontal", etc.
    
    // Metadata
    CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"`  // Original session creation
    Version   int       `json:"version"`     // Schema version for migrations
}

type PaneState struct {
    Title     string `json:"title"`      // e.g., "myproject__cc_1"
    Index     int    `json:"index"`
    AgentType string `json:"agent_type"` // "cc", "cod", "gmi", "user"
    Command   string `json:"command"`    // The agent launch command
    Active    bool   `json:"active"`     // Was this the active pane?
}
```

## Capture Process
1. Get session info from tmux
2. Get all panes with metadata
3. Detect working directory (from pane 0 or explicit)
4. Get git context if in repo
5. Serialize to JSON
6. Write to storage location

## Command Interface
```bash
ntm session save                 # Save current session (in tmux)
ntm session save myproject       # Save specific session
ntm session save --name=alias    # Save with custom name
ntm session save --overwrite     # Overwrite existing save
```

## Storage
Location: ~/.local/share/ntm/sessions/<name>.json

Directory structure:
```
~/.local/share/ntm/sessions/
├── myproject.json
├── frontend.json
└── backend.json
```

## Implementation
```go
func CaptureSessionState(sessionName string) (*SessionState, error) {
    session, err := tmux.GetSession(sessionName)
    if err \!= nil {
        return nil, err
    }
    
    panes, err := tmux.GetPanes(sessionName)
    if err \!= nil {
        return nil, err
    }
    
    // Extract agent configuration from pane names
    agents := countAgents(panes)
    
    // Get working directory
    cwd := detectWorkDir(panes)
    
    // Get git info if applicable
    gitBranch, gitRemote := getGitInfo(cwd)
    
    return &SessionState{
        Name:      sessionName,
        SavedAt:   time.Now(),
        WorkDir:   cwd,
        GitBranch: gitBranch,
        GitRemote: gitRemote,
        Agents:    agents,
        Panes:     mapPaneStates(panes),
        Layout:    session.Layout,
        CreatedAt: session.Created,
        Version:   1,
    }, nil
}
```

## Files to Create
- internal/session/state.go - State data structures
- internal/session/capture.go - Capture logic
- internal/session/storage.go - File I/O","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"BlueLake","created_at":"2025-12-10T02:41:31.459939-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T10:02:30.859238-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-10T10:02:30.859238-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ntm-bh5.1","depends_on_id":"ntm-bh5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-10T02:41:31.46201-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 		statusColor = t.Green
 	case "idle":
 		statusIcon = "○"
